info.title: Live view
info.description: Container web server exposed while the Actor is running. Renders the current server time and exposes an endpoint to stop the Actor.

get.description: Returns an HTML page showing the server's current time, centered on the screen. The page refreshes itself every second via `<meta http-equiv="refresh">` and contains a button that POSTs to `/exit`.

200.description: HTML page with the current time and a Stop button.

post.description: Signals the Actor to call `Actor.exit()` and shut down the container. Responds immediately with `{ "status": "exiting" }`; the exit happens asynchronously a fraction of a second later, after the response is flushed.
